rows.objective: **REVISED:** Settings Control Panel requires full UX upgrade from current two-panel layout to category-grid card layout matching design reference. PLUS: Left sidebar navigation must be collapsible to icon-only compact mode. Target: (1) Display all settings sections (General, Preferences, AI, Integrations, Security, System) as large clickable cards with icons + descriptions; (2) Left SettingsNavigation sidebar with collapse/expand toggle - full width shows labels + icons, compact mode shows only icons + tooltip labels; (3) Desktop-first grid, mobile accessible dropdown fallback.

Chat main window layout does not match design reference expectations. User reports current implementation is "broken" compared to what was communicated in design images. Requires detailed review of: layout structure, message display, input area, toolbar positioning, spacing/padding, and overall visual hierarchy matching the reference design. Also: Left sidebar should be collapsible to icon-only compact mode (similar to Settings).

stats.note: Each successful full rotation of project-bolt2-ongoing-work-dispatch saves 30 min as orchestrated.
